sentences.arabic: إِنَّ مَدَارَ الأَعْمَالِ الصَّالِحَةِ وَقَبُولَهَا عِنْدَ البَارِي يَرْتَبِطُ ارْتِبَاطاً وَثِيقاً بِنِيَّةِ العَبْدِ وَمَقْصِدِهِ القَلْبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Suština dobrih djela i njihovo prihvatanje kod Stvoritelja neraskidivo je povezano sa čovjekovom namjerom i ciljem u srcu.
sentences.translationEn: The essence of righteous deeds and their acceptance by the Creator is inextricably linked to the servant's intention and heartfelt purpose.

sentences.arabic: فَالنِّيَّةُ هِيَ رُوحُ العَمَلِ وَلُبُّهُ وَقَائِدُهُ إِلَى مَرَافِئِ القَبُولِ أَوْ مَهَاوِي الرَّدَى.
sentences.translation: Namjera je duh djela, njegova srž i vodič ka lukama spasa ili ponorima propasti.
sentences.translationEn: Intention is the spirit of the deed, its core, and its guide to the harbors of acceptance or the abysses of ruin.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ بَيَّنَ النَّبِيُّ -صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ- أَنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى مِنَ الأَجْرِ.
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, objasnio je da svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je nanijetio od nagrade.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) explained that every person shall have only what they intended in terms of reward.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَشَارَ إِلَى أَنَّ صِحَّةَ الأَفْعَالِ وَثَوَابَهَا مَرْهُونٌ بِصِدْقِ التَّوَجُّهِ لِلَّهِ وَحْدَهُ دُونَ سِوَاهُ [أَخْرَجَهُ البُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الوَحْيِ، رَقْمُ ١].
sentences.translation: Također je ukazao na to da ispravnost postupaka i njihova nagrada ovise o iskrenom usmjerenju isključivo prema Allahu [Buhari, Knjiga o početku objave, br. 1].
sentences.translationEn: He also indicated that the validity of actions and their recompense are contingent upon the sincerity of turning toward Allah alone [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation, No. 1].

sentences.arabic: وَيُؤَكِّدُ الإِمَامُ ابْنُ القَيِّمِ -رَحِمَهُ اللهُ- أَنَّ الإِخْلَاصَ هُوَ تَوْحِيدُ المَطْلَبِ فِي العِبَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim naglašava da je ihlas (iskrenost) zapravo jedinstvenost cilja u ibadetu, tako da se srce ni u kojem stanju ne okreće nikome drugom osim Onome koga obožava.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim emphasizes that sincerity (Ikhlas) is the unification of the objective in worship, such that the heart does not turn to anyone other than the One worshipped in any situation.

sentences.arabic: بِحَيْثُ لَا يَلْتَفِتُ القَلْبُ إِلَى غَيْرِ المَعْبُودِ فِي أَيِّ حَالٍ مِنَ الأَحْوَالِ.
sentences.translation: Umjesto toga, rob hitro korača ka zadovoljstvu svoga Gospodara, daleko od pretvaranja pred stvorenjima.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, the servant's journey is swift toward the pleasure of his Lord, isolated from the ostentation of creation.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ يَكُونُ سَيْرُ العَبْدِ حَثِيثاً نَحْوَ مَرْضَاةِ رَبِّهِ بِمَعْزِلٍ عَنْ رِيَاءِ الخَلْقِ.
sentences.translation: On svojim djelima ne traži ljudsku hvalu niti njihov prolazni hvalospjev.
sentences.translationEn: He does not seek human praise or their fleeting commendation through his actions.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يَطْلُبُ بِمَا يَعْمَلُ مَحْمَدَةَ النَّاسِ أَوْ ثَنَاءَهُمْ الزَّائِلَ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj duboki koncept zahtijeva od muslimana stalni nadzor nad unutrašnjim mislima.
sentences.translationEn: This profound concept necessitates that a Muslim maintain constant vigilance over his inner thoughts.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا المَفْهُومَ العَمِيقَ يَسْتَوْجِبُ مِنَ المُسْلِمِ مُرَاقَبَةً دَائِمَةً لِخَوَالِجِ نَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: On mora očistiti svoju nutrinu od primjesa skrivenog širka koji se može uvući u pokornosti.
sentences.translationEn: He must purify his inner self from the impurities of hidden polytheism (shirk) that might creep into acts of obedience.

sentences.arabic: فَعَلَيْهِ تَصْفِيَةُ سَرِيرَتِهِ مِنْ شَوَائِبِ الشِّرْكِ الخَفِيِّ الَّذِي قَدْ يَتَسَلَّلُ إِلَى الطَّاعَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Takav širk pretvara djela u prah i pepeo bez ikakve vrijednosti.
sentences.translationEn: Such shirk turns deeds into scattered dust of no value.

sentences.arabic: فَهَذَا الشِّرْكُ يُحِيلُ الأَعْمَالَ هَبَاءً مَنْثُوراً لَا قِيمَةَ لَهَا.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost nije samo puki napor jezika
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity is not merely a lingual effort

sentences.arabic: فَالإِخْلَاصُ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ جُهْدٍ لِسَانِيٍّ يَنْطِقُ بِهِ المَرْءُ.
sentences.translation: to je snažno djelo srca koje svakodnevne navike pretvara u veličanstvene ibadete.
sentences.translationEn: it is a powerful cardiac action that transforms daily habits into sublime acts of worship.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ عَمَلٌ قَلْبِيٌّ جَبَّارٌ يَنْقُلُ العَادَاتِ اليَوْمِيَّةَ إِلَى عِبَادَاتٍ جَلِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Time vjernik postaje privržen tajnim djelima koja niko osim Allaha ne zna.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the believer becomes keen on secret deeds known only to Allah.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذَلِكَ، يَغْدُو المُؤْمِنُ حَرِيصاً عَلَى خَبِيئَةِ العَمَلِ الَّتِي لَا يَعْلَمُهَا إِلَّا اللهُ.
sentences.translation: On teži da bude od iskrenih koje je Allah pohvalio.
sentences.translationEn: He aspires to be among the truthful ones whom Allah has praised.

sentences.arabic: فَهُوَ يَطْمَعُ فِي أَنْ يَكُونَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الصِّدْقِ الَّذِينَ أَثْنَى اللهُ عَلَيْهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Postizanje potpunog ihlasa zahtijeva neprestanu borbu protiv duše sklone zlu.
sentences.translationEn: Achieving pure sincerity requires continuous striving against the soul that incites evil.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَجْرِيدَ الإِخْلَاصِ يَتَطَلَّبُ مُجَاهَدَةً مُسْتَمِرَّةً لِلنَّفْسِ الأَمَّارَةِ بِالسُّوءِ.
sentences.translation: Također iziskuje stalno prisustvo svijesti o Allahovoj veličini u svakom pokretu i mirovanju.
sentences.translationEn: It also necessitates invoking the greatness of Allah in every movement and stillness.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَسْتَلْزِمُ اسْتِحْضَارَ عَظَمَةِ اللهِ فِي كُلِّ حَرَكَةٍ وَسُكُونٍ.
sentences.translation: Kroz takvu posvećenost, cijela vjera biva posvećena isključivo Allahu, Gospodaru svjetova.
sentences.translationEn: Through this devotion, the entirety of religion becomes solely for Allah, Lord of the Worlds.

sentences.arabic: وَبِهَذَا التَّجَرُّدِ، يَكُونُ الدِّينُ كُلُّهُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ العَالَمِينَ.
sentences.translation: Kroz takvu posvećenost, cijela vjera biva posvećena isključivo Allahu, Gospodaru svjetova.
sentences.translationEn: Through this devotion, the entirety of religion becomes solely for Allah, Lord of the Worlds.
